name: @intentsolutionsio/graphql-server-builder

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install graphql-server-builder\\n  or /plugin install graphql-server-builder@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
